title: Rudy Giuliani, former New York mayor and Trump lawyer, hospitalized in critical condition
summary_full: President Donald Trump called Rudy Giuliani a "True Warrior, and the Best Mayor in the History of New York City, BY FAR," in a Truth Social post.
summary_public: President Donald Trump called Rudy Giuliani a "True Warrior, and the Best Mayor in the History of New York City, BY FAR," in a Truth Social post.
